steps.name: I am on the Practo home page

elements.name: Find doctors by clicking Find Doctors Near You and display their names and experience

steps.name: I click on "Find Doctors Near You" card on the home page
the doctors listing page should load
I search for "Dermatologist" in the search box and submit
the doctor results page should load with doctor cards

name: Finding Doctors Near You on Practo
description:
As a user of Practo
  I want to find doctors near me by clicking "Find Doctors Near You"
  So that I can view the names and experience of available doctors

steps.name: the hospital listing page should load
I collect the top 20 hospital links
I visit each hospital and filter by Open 24x7, Parking facility, and Rating above 3.5
I display the names of all matching hospitals

name: Finding Hospitals in Bangalore
description:
As a user of Practo
  I want to find hospitals in Bangalore that are open 24x7,
  have parking, and are rated above 3.5
  So that I can choose the best healthcare facility
